text:
Cavic (カビッチ, Kabitchi) is a Private Guard of the Second Prince Camilla and the one formerly in charge of killing the Twelfth Prince Momoze through a Nen curse. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 389 

Appearance

Cavic has short, fair hair with a few longer locks in the cowlick on their high forehead. They have big, round eyes, long eyelashes, and a small nose with large nostrils. They wear the standard uniform of Camilla's private guards. 

Personality

Like their Have-Nots comrades, Cavic is a staunch supporter of Prince Camilla. They would go as far as to sacrifice their life to curse one of the other Princes in order to secure their Prince's position as the Kakin's newest King.

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Cavic and the other personal soldiers of Prince Camilla attend a meeting held by Sarahell about the recent suicide of Shikaku. The meeting concerns the possibility of him also being able to cast a Nen curse similar to their own. As their curse target, the Twelfth Prince Momoze, was assassinated by Tuffdy, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 368 they and Nukuocon are reassigned by Sarahell to spy on enemy camps to find out if they have any exorcists on their side. This task should also help them not cause any trouble for their Prince Camilla. 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Cavic is a Nen user and can cast the same curse as the other Have-Nots in Prince Camilla's employ. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Although their design is slightly different, the parting, fair hair and high forehead may suggest that Cavic was one of the bodyguards shown in Chapter 373.
The furigana name of the Have-Nots' curse is derived from Japanese mythology, specifically to Izanami's inability to leave the underworld due to having eaten of its food.
The kanji name of the curse, "Tsujitsuma Awase ni Umareta Bokura", is derived from a song by Amazarashi.
Viz localized the curse's name as "Dust in the Wind: Hell Fruit".
